parameters.query:
=SELECT store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours
FROM public.stores
WHERE (
  {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
  AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }}
)
   OR owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}'
ORDER BY CASE
  WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
  WHEN owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}' THEN 1
  ELSE 2
END,
COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'priority') AS has_priority,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'description') AS has_description,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'discount_type') AS has_discount_type,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'discount_value') AS has_discount_value,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'min_cart_value') AS has_min_cart_value,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'promo_scope') AS has_promo_scope,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'target_sku') AS has_target_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'target_category') AS has_target_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'promo_group_code') AS has_promo_group_code,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'valid_from') AS has_valid_from,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'promotions' AND column_name = 'valid_until') AS has_valid_until;

SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active;

={{ (() => { const s = $('Inspect Inventory Schema').first().json || {}; const store = $('Resolve Store Context').first().json || {}; const b = (value) => value === true || value === 'true' || value === 't' || value === 1 || value === '1'; const hasStoreId = b(s.has_store_id); const hasSku = b(s.has_sku); const hasCategory = b(s.has_category); const hasIsActive = b(s.has_is_active); const cols = ["item_name", hasSku ? "COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku" : "'' AS sku", hasCategory ? "COALESCE(category, '') AS category" : "'' AS category", hasIsActive ? "COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active" : "true AS is_active"]; const where = hasStoreId ? (Number(store.store_id || 0) > 0 ? "store_id = " + Number(store.store_id || 0) : '1=0') : '1=1'; return "SELECT " + cols.join(', ') + " FROM public.inventory WHERE " + where + " ORDER BY item_name ASC LIMIT 500;"; })() }}

={{ (() => { const s = $('Inspect Promo Schema').first().json || {}; const store = $('Resolve Store Context').first().json || {}; const b = (value) => value === true || value === 'true' || value === 't' || value === 1 || value === '1'; const hasStoreId = b(s.has_store_id); const hasIsActive = b(s.has_is_active); const hasPromoScope = b(s.has_promo_scope); const hasDiscountType = b(s.has_discount_type); const hasDiscountValue = b(s.has_discount_value); const hasMinCartValue = b(s.has_min_cart_value); const hasTargetSku = b(s.has_target_sku); const hasTargetCategory = b(s.has_target_category); const hasDescription = b(s.has_description); const hasPromoGroupCode = b(s.has_promo_group_code); const cols = ["promo_code", hasPromoGroupCode ? "COALESCE(promo_group_code, '') AS promo_group_code" : "'' AS promo_group_code", hasPromoScope ? "COALESCE(promo_scope, '') AS promo_scope" : "'' AS promo_scope", hasDiscountType ? "COALESCE(discount_type, '') AS discount_type" : "'' AS discount_type", hasDiscountValue ? "COALESCE(discount_value, 0) AS discount_value" : "0 AS discount_value", hasMinCartValue ? "COALESCE(min_cart_value, 0) AS min_cart_value" : "0 AS min_cart_value", hasTargetSku ? "COALESCE(target_sku, '') AS target_sku" : "'' AS target_sku", hasTargetCategory ? "COALESCE(target_category, '') AS target_category" : "'' AS target_category", hasDescription ? "COALESCE(description, '') AS description" : "'' AS description", hasIsActive ? "COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active" : "true AS is_active"]; const where = hasStoreId ? (Number(store.store_id || 0) > 0 ? "store_id = " + Number(store.store_id || 0) : '1=0') : '1=1'; return "SELECT " + cols.join(', ') + " FROM public.promotions WHERE " + where + " ORDER BY promo_code ASC LIMIT 500;"; })() }}

=SELECT session_id, operation_type, status, parsed_payload_json, preview_rows_json, cleanup_summary_json
FROM public.owner_operation_sessions
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}'
  AND operation_type IN ('promo_draft', 'promo_preview')
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $('Normalize Input').first().json;
const message = String(raw.message || '').trim();
const prompt = [
  'Return only raw JSON. No markdown. No explanation.',
  'You are extracting a kirana store owner promotion instruction.',
  'Allowed intents: create_promo, list_promos, deactivate_promo, help.',
  'Allowed promo_type: product_percentage, order_percentage_threshold, order_percentage, order_flat, unknown.',
  'Return keys: intent, promo_type, target_text, discount_value, min_cart_value, expiry_text, priority_text, promo_code, confidence.',
  'Use empty string for unknown text fields and null for unknown numeric fields.',
  'Examples:',
  '{"intent":"create_promo","promo_type":"product_percentage","target_text":"Eggs 10","discount_value":50,"min_cart_value":null,"expiry_text":"","priority_text":"","promo_code":"","confidence":0.95}',
  '{"intent":"create_promo","promo_type":"order_flat","target_text":"","discount_value":20,"min_cart_value":null,"expiry_text":"","priority_text":"","promo_code":"","confidence":0.94}',
  '{"intent":"create_promo","promo_type":"order_percentage_threshold","target_text":"","discount_value":5,"min_cart_value":300,"expiry_text":"","priority_text":"","promo_code":"","confidence":0.96}',
  '{"intent":"list_promos","promo_type":"unknown","target_text":"","discount_value":null,"min_cart_value":null,"expiry_text":"","priority_text":"","promo_code":"","confidence":0.99}',
  'Owner message:',
  message || '(empty)',
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { prompt } }];
